name: Hunting Master
description: A strategic hunting game where power decides victory! Choose your wolf targets and compare your attack power with them—defeat enemies with higher strength and recruit them into your hunting team instantly! Gather powerful wolves, upgrade your total attack, and challenge stronger prey step by step. Easy to play, strategic to win, build your ultimate hunting pack and become the true master of the wild!
instructions: Tap to select prey and check attack power Tap to confirm and start the battle Defeated prey join your team automatically Tap to upgrade your team rsquo s total attack power Swipe to switch hunting areas for more targets
